subject: 3 million

body:
It's going to take this entire team to pull this off | Friend --

If there's one thing I know about this campaign -- it's that if we set a goal, we go above and beyond to meet it. From knocking on doors in the primary to help deliver over 16 million votes for Hillary, to coming through at a big fundraising deadline, we’ve shown Hillary time and time again that this team will always have her back.

Today we're launching our most ambitious goal yet: We're going to get at least 3 million people to register (or commit) to vote. We know that every vote matters, and now all of us who have stood by Hillary’s side need to bring even more folks into the fold if we want to turn out the votes we need to win on November 8th.

If we do this (and I know we can), it'll be historic. No other presidential campaign has ever committed this many voters.

It's going to take this entire team to pull this off, so we're starting with a big organizing challenge over the next two weeks -- and we’re really counting on voters like you to be a part of it!

There are seven challenges, and I'm not going to tell you all of them because that would ruin the surprise! But you can look forward to committing to vote for Hillary on Election Day, checking in to make sure your friends and family are registered to vote, and much, much more.

**We'll be here to help every step of the way, too. So what do you say, ready to be part of the team that's going to connect with 3 million voters?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYwMDE1MzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNDgzOTA4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Michelle

National Organizing Director
Hillary for America

name: Team Bullock
subject: Protect Montana's public lands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---

Friend,

Access to Montana's public lands, rivers and streams is under attack. This week, the national GOP convention begins -- with a platform that calls for the transfer of federal lands to the states. As Montanans know, this is a first step in selling our public lands off to the highest bidder.

Ahead of the convention, tell Greg Gianforte that this is a direct assault on Montana values. **[Add your name today to tell Greg Gianforte that this is a direct assault on Montana values and let him know that Montanans will always oppose the transferring of federal lands, not just"at this time."](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=nl108QVhBRlOikSTb%2Fs6RFG9muWyrbVS)

Support for these policies should disqualify him from becoming governor of Montana.**

Mr. Gianforte's record on public access and public lands is troubling:
* Mr. Gianforte has donated tens of thousands of dollars to organizations like the Koch-backed Amercians for Prosperity, the Heritage Foundation, Property and Environment Research Center (PERC) and the Foundation for Research on the Economy and the Environment (FREE) **that are actively working to privatize national forests, end Montana 's stream access law and pave the way to sell off public lands.**

* He's left the door open to the transfer of public lands, only saying it's not attainable "at this time."

* He filed suit against the state to block public stream access on his land.

It's clear that Montanans can't trust him to protect access to public lands.

You shouldn't have to be a millionaire to be able to fish, hike or hunt. There are also tens of thousands of jobs and billions of dollars in economic activity that depend on public lands and our outdoor recreational economy. Steve understands this and he has spent his career defending public access against wealthy out-of-state interests.

Don't let Greg Gianforte and the national GOP jeopardize this. **[Hold him accountable before the convention begins.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=2NyWmSzGUPkAor415zxw1tkL2Tl9Dcqq)**

Thanks,

Team Bullock

subject: FWD: I'm being attacked

body:
Friend, did you see the email I sent you? Friend,

Did you see the email I sent you last week?

My opponent is spending $1 million in television advertising against me this week across Florida and **[I need your immediate help to fight back.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36507396:WPwp_nYNC:m:1:1328517760:90BD6F88669E9E0D8B0BFB6E309AFA7B:r)**

Since I announced my campaign less than one month ago, we are at a fundraising disadvantage against the Democrats. They've had over a year to raise money and build up a strong campaign infrastructure. That said, I have something much more powerful than he does: YOUR support. **I know if I have YOUR support I can win this election.**

**[It's going to take all hands on deck -- and I hope I can count on yours.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36507396:WPwp_nYNC:m:1:1328517760:90BD6F88669E9E0D8B0BFB6E309AFA7B:r) **

We've set a goal to raise $500,000 by the end of the month, and are still $327,000 away from it. I hope I can count on you to stand with me today!

**[Please follow this link to make a secure online contribution today!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36507396:WPwp_nYNC:m:1:1328517760:90BD6F88669E9E0D8B0BFB6E309AFA7B:r) **

Woman Cards are back for an important reason | Friend --

Mike Pence just might be the most anti-woman politician to get tapped for vice president in modern history -- **[so in his honor, and in honor of the first day of the Republican National Convention, we’re bringing back our Woman Cards for a one-day flash sale. Donate for the first time now to get yours for free!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYwMDU3ODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNTg4OTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0) ** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYwMDU3ODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNTg4OTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Mike Pence says, “I long for the day that _Roe v. Wade_ is sent to the ash heap of history.” He even sponsored a bill that would allow hospitals to refuse to perform abortions on women who need them to save their lives.

He waged what the press described as “a one-man war on Planned Parenthood” -- he held up the entire federal budget and tried to shut down the government to force Democrats to agree to defund Planned Parenthood.

Mike Pence voted repeatedly against equal pay legislation. He’s gone so far as to say he regretted that he wasn’t a woman, because if he was, he thought people would take his anti-choice views more seriously.

No wonder the guy who said women who get abortions deserve “some form of punishment” picked Pence to be his running mate.

We’re taking Trump and Pence’s anti-woman views damn seriously. We’re going to get women more engaged in this election than any in history, and we’re going to elect the strongest fighter for women and girls the White House has ever seen.

**If you’re with us, chip in right now to show Mike Pence and Donald Trump exactly who they’re up against -- and for today only, we’ll send you a free Woman Card for every donation you make:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYwMDU3ODMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNTg4OTUwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
If standing up for women’s agency, autonomy, and equality is “playing the woman card,” then deal us in. I’m so glad you’re part of this amazing team.

Thank you,

Mini

Mini Timmaraju
Women’s Outreach Director
Hillary for America

name: Mike Weinholtz
subject: Utah is not for sale
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
body:
| | This past Saturday I traveled to Bluff, Utah, for the Bears Ears hearing with Sally Jewell, the U.S. Secretary of the Interior.
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3036055071361272576/4916470634902653696?am=&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) This past Saturday I traveled to Bluff, Utah, for the Bears Ears hearing with Sally Jewell, the U.S. Secretary of the Interior. It's always incredible to visit any of our stunning Utah landscapes, but this trip felt different. It felt deeper. This trip reinforced to me that we can never forget that these places are more than interesting geography-- they are home to real people and their families. In the midst of all the political buzz, it's crucial that the debate over public lands never obscure that simple truth: Utah is our home. And our home is not for sale. **[Pitch in $25 now to help us stand up to those who would sooner sell Utah than serve it!](https://act.myngp.com/el/3036055071361272576/4916470634902653696?am=25&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3036055071361272576/4916470634902653696?recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) It's unfortunate that our current governor chooses to spend his time in office trying to fight unwinnable and backward-looking battles, like trying to shut down Planned Parenthood, turn back the clock on LGTBQ rights, or privatize tens of millions of acres of public land for development. Let's keep our public lands in public hands so our state government can focus on real problems, like getting proper funding for our kids' schools and cleaning up our toxic air. **[Can I count on you for $25 to help protect our home, Peter?](https://act.myngp.com/el/3036055071361272576/4916470634902653696?am=25&recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** Thanks!
Mike | Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor

subject: We’ve written a letter to Trump -- will you sign it?

body:
We wrote an open letter to Trump | Friend --

Today is the first day of the Republican National Convention -- by the time it's over on Thursday night, the party of Lincoln will have formally nominated Donald Trump to be the 28th person in American history to carry their torch and define the core values of their party.

This team isn’t going to wait until OUR convention next week, or until Election Day to tell the world that we stand against him and everything he's fighting for.

Our team has written an open letter to Donald Trump -- will you sign it? **[You can read it right here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYwMDk4OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNjIzMDMwS0&mt=1&rt=0) ** \-- and let him and the world know that who he is and what he represents does not and will never represent you.

This is a moment that the Republicans are hoping will be a highlight of this election. This is their convention, their platform, and their chosen candidate. They want to raise a lot of money, get Trump-size ratings on TV, and broadcast their divisive and dangerous message all across America. They know that the party conventions are an opportunity to define this race. Put it another way -- they want to win this race this week.

We must show the world that this team -- with Hillary fighting her heart out at the top of the ticket -- will never let Donald Trump come close to the White House. And today, the best way to do that, as they open their convention and make their clearest pitch yet to the American public, is to **[sign our open letter to him.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjYwMDk4OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNjIzMDMwS0&mt=1&rt=0) ** And then share it with the people you love who also stand with Hillary and also stand for love, kindness, equality, and empathy.

**The GOP wants to define America this week. Don’t let them. We are better than this.** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYwMDk4OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNjIzMDMwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYwMDk4OTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyNjIzMDMwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Christian Pancake
subject: today's event in Cleveland
body:
| Peter --

As Chairman of the Ohio College Republican Federation, I was excited to be a part of Rob Portman's volunteer appreciation event today in Cleveland!

More than 400 volunteers and interns representing over 30 campuses across the state came in to celebrate with Rob, Speaker Newt Gingrich, and Senator Joni Ernst. The Portman campaign is running one of the most advanced campaigns in the history of our state -- over 500 summer interns have helped the campaign contact 2.8 million voters since May of last year. Over 1,000 interns volunteer their time every week in the campaign's 10 offices![
](https://www.robportman.com/shredded?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volevent_2&n=1)
Today at our event, Speaker Gingrich and Senator Ernst spoke about the importance of re-electing Rob. The reason Rob has so many volunteers and interns behind him is because we believe in his policies for better wages and more jobs. The campaign's Students for Portman coalition is organized on over 30 campuses because we want good-paying jobs after college -- we don't want to return to Ted Strickland's Ohio when our state lost more than 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation!

All eyes are on Ohio and Rob's Senate race. Be sure to [watch the highlight video](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FakfuiDRcq4Q&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volevent_2&n=2) of the campaign's grassroots and everything we are doing to reach out to Ohio voters and make sure Rob wins in November.

Sincerely,

Christian Pancake
Chairman
Ohio College Republican Federation

[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volevent_2&n=3)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volevent_2&n=4)[](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volevent_2&n=5)
---
-=-=-

name: Justin Matheson
subject: respect
body:
Friend --

After his million-dollar evening with President Obama that shut down half of Seattle to commuters, the only thing Jay Inslee doesn’t need to worry about is fundraising.

His campaign is grasping for a message much like his administration, which he desperately wants you to believe is about anything other than bureaucratic failures and scandals. All they can come up with is “worried.”
